dict.string: Nebo reads and organizes files on your Desktop when you ask it to.
Nebo reads and organizes files in your Documents when you ask it to.
Nebo reads and organizes files in your Downloads when you ask it to.
Nebo controls apps like Calendar, Reminders, Music, and Finder on your behalf.
Nebo reads and manages your calendar events when you ask it to.
Nebo reads and manages your reminders when you ask it to.
Nebo looks up and manages your contacts when you ask it to.
Nebo uses the camera when you ask it to capture or analyze video.
Nebo uses the microphone for voice input.
